## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows style guide (runs `npm run lint` / `black`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed code for obvious errors
- [ ] Commented complex logic
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No `console.log()` in production code
- [ ] No `any` types in TypeScript
- [ ] Proper error handling

### Documentation
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation files
- [ ] Added/updated docstrings/comments
- [ ] Updated API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated README (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated examples

### Security
- [ ] No SQL injection vulnerabilities
- [ ] No XSS vulnerabilities
- [ ] Proper input validation
- [ ] Proper authentication/authorization
- [ ] No security-sensitive data in logs
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (gitleaks, etc.)

### Git
- [ ] Branch name follows convention: `feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, etc.
- [ ] Commits are atomic and descriptive
- [ ] No merge commits (rebased if needed)
- [ ] Large files (>10MB) not included

### CI/CD
- [ ] All automated checks pass (green ✅)
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Tests run successfully in CI
